chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1060 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.6329/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6330/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 05.11.2025 Mr. Haseebullah Lakho, Advocate along with applicants / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Applicants / accused Basheer Ahmed S/o Muhammad Paryal, Wazeer S/o Muhammad Paryal, Ahmedan alias Imdad S/o Muhammad Sharif, Daimuddin S/o Sono, Raheem Bux S/o Bakhsho, Wakeel Ahmed S/o Shah Ali alias Goshu, all by caste Lolai, seek protective bail in Crime No.137/2024, registered at Police Station ‘A’ Section, Ghotki, under Sections 302, 114, 147, 148, 149, PPC. It is, inter alia, contended that applicants / accused are prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehend their arrest as NBWs have been issued against them. Without touching merits of the case, protective bail is granted to the applicants / accused for a period of three days, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,000/- (Rupees ten thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of the NBWs shall stand suspended for the period of three days. Applicants / accused shall surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of three days or when the applicants / accused surrender before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms.

This order shall cease to have any effect after expiry of three days or when the applicants / accused surrender before the trial court, whichever occurs earlier. The bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
